Document:
# System Reference
Quick reference for all major OpenEdge 14 systems. Each entry links to detailed documentation.
## Core Systems
- [textlink="OE14CharacterStats System" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Stats"] — STR/VIT/DEX/INT stats, modifiers, and point spending - [textlink="Magic & Spell Systems" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Magic"] — spells, mana, spell storage - [textlink="Crafting Systems" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Crafting"] — workbench, cooking, modular crafting - [textlink="Economy System" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Economy"] — currency, salary, trading platform - [textlink="Combat System" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Combat"] — melee, damage, skills - [textlink="Other Systems" link="OE14_DEV_SysRef_Other"] — farming, status effects, demiplane, vampire
## Quick Lookup
[bold]I want to add stat bonuses[/bold] — see OE14CharacterStats System and [textlink="Modifier System" link="OE14_DEV_Arch_Modifiers"]
[bold]I want to add a new spell[/bold] — see Magic & Spell Systems and [textlink="Adding New Spells" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Spells"]
[bold]I want to add a crafting recipe[/bold] — see Crafting Systems and [textlink="Adding New Skills" link="OE14_DEV_Guide_Skills"]
[bold]I want to add a new item to the shop[/bold] — see Economy System
[bold]I want to add a status effect[/bold] — see Other Systems
